sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41332" key="e)pitexnologe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτεχνολογέω</orth>, <sense id="n41332.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">add to the rules of an art,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg006:[518:4]" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Top.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">[518.4]</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
